TimeEntry.Title: Performed Weekly Firewall Backup for VG:- Sophos Firewall
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the firewall to perform the weekly backup for the VG:- Sophos Firewall. Downloaded the backup file and placed the same file on the Team Channel under the network config-firewall folder. Hence, closing this ticket

TimeEntry.Title: Server pending for reboot after ADP
TimeEntry.Notes: Log in to the Manage Engine to check the servers VG-DC-3CX-02 which have not been rebooted. and installed failed patches. So connected to the servers and rebooted them and verified all the services are running fine.

TimeEntry.Title: Spam email please block sender : Colleen Rozen
TimeEntry.Notes:
Same has been done, Following are the SPAM mail and domain that we have blocked.
makeshop@imahan.com
imahan.com

TimeEntry.Title: Lia Dalhover
TimeEntry.Notes: Colleen mailed in that need to disable a user Lia Dalhover MFA. So log into the Microsoft 365 and check the MFA was disabled, then log into the Azure portal and verify the MFA was disabled. So log into the user profile and verify that SMS was enabled to send to his cell phone. So disable that and same has been informed hence closing the ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Vintage Group - Posting messages in teams
TimeEntry.Notes:
Colleen mailed in that she want to know if a team channel owner can edit any user message...

so login to the Teams policies and verify that there is no such option that owner can edit the message...However owner can delete the message if that policies is set to that...same has been informed to colleen..

then she asked if user are not supposed to port the message...

then again check the Teams policy then found out that there is a option under channel settings that we can restrict the user to post the message...Only owner can post the message in that group..

same has been informed to colleen, waiting for the user response.........

TimeEntry.Title: AR ******SPAM************* : Colleen Rozen
TimeEntry.Notes: Spam has been blocked.

TimeEntry.Title: SPAM. Fwd: Completed - Settlement Review & Agreement Amendment -Vintagegroupre //MESSA= ID: 1775663726
TimeEntry.Notes: Got an mail from Amy Moore regarding block the suspicious email Sender. login into the o365 admin portal and Block the entire domain address of suspicious emails. after that confirmation mail is sent to the user. hence ticket has been closed.

TimeEntry.Title: 3cx issue and block mail
TimeEntry.Notes:
Blocked a spam email reported by Colleen.

User Velta reported an issue with 3CX outbound calling. Contacted the user and reviewed the configuration. Assigned the correct Outbound Caller ID and performed a test call with the user.

Outbound calling is now working as expected.

TimeEntry.Title: FW: Emerald Pointe Hoa *****SPAM?***
TimeEntry.Notes: Got an mail from colleen regarding block the suspicious email Sender. login into the o365 admin portal and Block the entire domain address of suspicious emails. after that confirmation mail is sent to the user. hence ticket has been closed.

TimeEntry.Title: RE: HVAC Service Agreement at 4228 NCX - Awaiting Approval ref#4
TimeEntry.Notes: As per the email login to the portal and block the vendor form the portal and sent the confirmation email to Colleen.

TimeEntry.Title: 3CX problem
TimeEntry.Notes:
The user was experiencing issues with 3CX. Initial troubleshooting steps were taken, including resetting the user’s password through the backend and triggering a password-reset email. However, the user did not receive the email.

The user called back after an hour, and we proceeded to reset the password manually from our side. I then connected to the user’s device remotely, assisted with installing the 3CX application, and confirmed that the user was able to log in successfully.

TimeEntry.Title: Network Detective Scan March-2026
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the rapid fire tool and then initiate a network scan for VG client. Once the scan is completed for all then start generating the reports.

TimeEntry.Title: Weekly Firewall backup for the VG Firewall
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the firewall to perform the weekly backup for the VG Firewall, downloaded the backup file, and placed it in the Team Channel under the network config-firewall folder. Hence, closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Network Detective Scan March-2026
TimeEntry.Notes: Go to the web and then generate the reports for VG and copy the reports to Teams folder under clients folder along with Monthly scan folder.

TimeEntry.Title: Update 3cx version 20 to the latest release update.
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into VG 3cx server and then complete the backup of the server. After that logged into the vCenter and take a snapshot of the server in case we need it to revert. Once the snapshots have been taken logged into the server and then start downloading the patches. Install all pending updates on 3cx application and then reboot the server. Once all the windows and 3cx have to updated after reboot verify all the services are up and running properly as expected. Then make a test calls on given number to make sure the issue has been resolved. Updated client regarding the status.

TimeEntry.Title: Change password for users
TimeEntry.Notes:
there was email from Colleen-

Good morning this is definitely a spoofing email Shawn Snook did not send anything out to anybody at 6:40 this morning. 

However, what we need to do immediately is change Shawn Snook’s Microsoft password immediately and please text it to me at 949-922-1266. 

Also, Kelly’s Scotkovsky accidentally clicked on the link as well so we need to change her Microsoft password immediately and please text it to me at 949-922-1266

Lastly, I’m going to send a message out to the entire team about this however, we will let you know if anything else comes up  

Please make their passwords completely random and eight characters along with the random series of letters and numbers and symbols. Thank you, Colleen.

and billy as well.

TimeEntry.Title: FW: ShawnMarie, question
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the Office365, added the email address to the block list. updated the same to the user.

TimeEntry.Title: CICI called in regarding the issuewith 3cx Extension Routing by name is not working for colleen.
TimeEntry.Notes:
CICI called in regarding the issuewith 3cx Extension Routing by name is not working for colleen as its working fine for others...

So login to the 3cx portal and Verify and also compare the 3cx settings of colleen account with CICI....

However the settings are same make a test call as well but still its not working...

Also found there are 2 accounts with the name of colleen...so remove the colleen test account and checked again but still the Routing by name is not working...

Also set-up a test account to check the Routing by name that is also not working....

So called the CICI again and informed that we are still working on the issue and took more time from the user.......

TimeEntry.Title: forward calls - colleen
TimeEntry.Notes:
Please forward my calls and Amy Moore calls to Velta Mansfield until Wednesday morning at 8 AM. Thank you. -Colleen

 (AMY extension 397). and tested

TimeEntry.Title: Vintage Group
TimeEntry.Notes:
As per the colleen email need to set the call and email forwarding for Jeeni and also reset her password...

so login to the O365 and reset her password and also set the mail forwarding...

Also login to 3cx portal and set the call forwarding to justin.......hence closing the ticket.....

TimeEntry.Title: Re: Vintage Group 3cx
TimeEntry.Notes:
Received a request from Colleen Rozen regarding Paloma being out sick. As per the request, the following actions were taken to ensure that all of Paloma's calls are forwarded to Cici Brown (Extension 328):

  1. Configured Call Forwarding for Unanswered and Busy Calls:
    • External calls and internal calls to Paloma (Extension 337) will now be forwarded to Cici Brown (Extension 328).
    • The No Answer Timeout is set to 1 second, meaning if Paloma doesn't answer, the call will immediately forward to Cici Brown.
    • Calls made to Paloma when she is busy or not registered will also be forwarded to Cici Brown.
  2. No Voicemail Setup:
    • Voicemail forwarding is disabled, ensuring that all calls are directly forwarded to Cici Brown instead of going to voicemail.
  3. Email Confirmation to Colleen:
    • After completing the configuration, I sent an email to Colleen Rozen confirming that the call forwarding for Paloma has been successfully set up and all calls will now go to Cici Brown while Paloma is out sick.

Current Status:
The call forwarding has been successfully configured for Paloma. All calls will now be forwarded to Cici Brown (Extension 328). The email has been sent to Colleen Rozen confirming the setup.

TimeEntry.Title: 3cx
TimeEntry.Notes: 3cx call forward,  collenn request

TimeEntry.Title: Vintage Group - Del Webb General Line
TimeEntry.Notes:
Cici mailed in regarding the Office location is opened on the Weekend for the phone line 2095-936-638..

So login to the 3cx portal chekced the settings in cx and for the office hours as well

so set the office hour schedules for that particular DID number...

TimeEntry.Title: 3CX
TimeEntry.Notes: colleen she had issue locating an email from 3cx, voicemail.

TimeEntry.Title: Vintage Group - 3CX
TimeEntry.Notes: Front End call with Ms Collen.

TimeEntry.Title: Vintage Group - 3CX
TimeEntry.Notes:
Colleen mailed in that she has voicemail from this number 909-764-9398 but has not received email.....

so login to the O365 portal and run the trace and found that she has recived the voicemail email...

so login to the Microsoft purview compliance and run the Ediscovery query to get the email...

so configure the conditions and run the query so able to locate the mail and voice-message has been shared to colleen.

hence closing the ticket......

TimeEntry.Title: CrowdStrike Sensor Updated with Version 7.34.20610.0: VG-DC-3CX-02
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into the CrowdStrike portal, we verified that the CrowdStrike Sensor Version on the following machines is on old version (7.33.20505.0). Connected to the machines VG-DC-3CX-02 from manage engine, download and installed the latest Sensor Version 7.34.20610.0. After that verified in the portal it is updated to latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: add and remove users
TimeEntry.Notes:
*Assisted Colleen, on teams owners. checked the ownership

I checked the permission; you are an owner. Can you please try these steps to remove the user.

“More options (?)” → Manage team → Members → Remove the user.  If you get an error, please share with us. We can check it for you. If you want, we can remove the user as well.

 

* Created a profile for the user.

Bency Molina

Email to bency@vintagegroupre.com

 

* Remove license from the users. create shared mailbox. 

Jennifer Sanders?

Jennifer Eldair?

 

*check paychex Ips and if they are whitelisted.

*check spam mail.
